mapper.select: SELECT SO_HDKEY ,OR_WK_TYPE_CD ,OR_WK_STATUS_CD ,INSERTDATE ,INSERTURKEY ,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_RSLT_HD WHERE SO_HDKEY = #{so_hdkey} AND OR_WK_TYPE_CD = #{or_wk_type_cd}

SELECT SO_HDKEY ,SO_DTKEY ,OR_WK_TYPE_CD ,SUM(CFQTY) AS CFQTY ,COSTPRICE ,SALEPRICE ,SUM(RJQTY) AS CFQTY ,IBNRCD FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_RSLT_DT WHERE SO_HDKEY = #{so_hdkey} AND SO_DTKEY = #{so_dtkey} AND OR_WK_TYPE_CD = #{or_wk_type_cd} GROUP BY SO_HDKEY ,SO_DTKEY ,OR_WK_TYPE_CD ,CFDATE ,CFQTY ,COSTPRICE ,SALEPRICE ,RJQTY ,IBNRCD
SELECT CTKEY ,POHDKEY ,PODTKEY FROM TORDER_INFO_ASN_DT WHERE SO_HDKEY = #{so_hdkey} AND SO_DTKEY = #{so_dtkey}
